name: Fake Kentucky Fried Chicken Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, blend 1 cup of water and 1/4 cup of cornstarch until smooth.
2. Pour the blended mixture into a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add 10 oz of chicken broth (or homemade stock) and 2 chicken bouillon cubes to the saucepan.
4. Stir in 20 oz of beef gravy, continuing to stir until the mixture thickens and becomes clear.
5. Sprinkle with 1 pinch of sage for added flavor.
6. Serve the gravy over heated chicken.
7. This recipe serves 6 people nicely.
